title: Professional, consulting, and personal service contracts
doc_html:
§1541.  Professional, consulting, and personal service contracts

Contracts for professional, consulting, and personal services shall be awarded as provided by R.S. 39:1481 et seq.

Added by Acts 1980, No. 520, §1, eff. July 1, 1980.
